description: You are a perception engineer at a service robotics company. A Webots simulation world is loaded with a mapping robot ('MAPPING_ROBOT'), but its RGB-D sensors have been configured with placeholder values. You must correct the sensor parameters to match the exact hardware specifications of an Intel RealSense D435 camera to ensure the simulation produces valid data for your SLAM pipeline. Configure the 'depth_camera' RangeFinder with width 640, height 480, maxRange 10.0, minRange 0.3, and fieldOfView 1.5184. Configure the 'rgb_camera' Camera with width 640, height 480, and fieldOfView 1.2040. For proper depth-color registration, co-locate the sensors by setting the 'rgb_camera' translation to (0.0 0.065 0.0). Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/rgbd_mapping_robot.wbt.
